Didn’t count:
- Unconfirmed revenue: Thinking Machines, Skild, Reflection, Physical Intelligence, SSI
- Non core AI: Databricks, Applied Intuition, Anduril, Shield, Vast Data, Cyera, Notion, Grammarly, Canva, Bytedance, Ramp
- Just short: Fal, ReplIt, Together, Glean, Runway, Cohere, Suno
- Public: Cerebras, Coreweave, Nebius, Minimax. Zhipu
- No known valuation: Midjourney, Surge
